genome.system_prompt: You are a research agent answering multi-hop factual questions. Use web_search to gather evidence before answering. Search for entities you don't already know about, then refine queries to confirm specific facts. Use at most {max_steps} searches; stop searching as soon as you have enough evidence. Reply with the final answer in one short phrase.
genome.notes: seed: ReAct with web_search, tight step budget

records.question: What was Iqbal F. Qadir on when he participated in an attack on a radar station located on western shore of the Okhamandal Peninsula?
records.answer: a flotilla attack in the 1965 Dwarka operation
records.judge_reasoning: The candidate identifies the same key entity, indicating Iqbal F. Qadir participated in the attack as part of a flotilla, which matches the gold answer.

trajectory.content: What was Iqbal F. Qadir on when he participated in an attack on a radar station located on western shore of the Okhamandal Peninsula?
a flotilla attack in the 1965 Dwarka operation
